Our technologies

Purpose-built tools for modern genomics

Explore our suite of technologies and databases designed for advanced discovery, precision diagnostics, and clinical clarity.

Quinary inference

The next generation of genomic inference, integrating observed findings, missing possibilities and unresolved uncertainty into a verifiable causal account.

Quant

The missing element in genomic interpretation. Database, scan, and state-of-the-art algorithm.

QuantBayes

Gives genomics a shared evidence language. Every variant. Every pipeline. Every institution.

Structured genomics

Improve on familiar genomic concepts, while turning evidence and workflows into structured data that can be reviewed, exchanged and reused.

VCFheader

The fastest way to understand a VCF before reading a single variant.

Qualifying variant database

The open standard for variant interpretation, with trusted QV sets to enhance clarity and reproducibility in WGS.

ACMG Validator

A browser-based ACMG/AMP evidence review and classification validator for structured variant interpretation, caveat checking, multi-variant case review, and report export.

Pedigree

Build free structured clinical pedigrees, record phenotype and genomic findings, and export publication-ready figures and technical reports, and pedigree chart.

Genomic infrastructure

Preserve, govern and exchange genomic data, evidence and provenance so that results remain accessible, auditable and reusable.

Genomic vault

Sequencing produces genome data. Genomic Vault provides custody.

Evidence ratio

Clinical trials and biomedical studies produce results that cannot be compared directly because each endpoint reports evidence differently.

Genomic discovery

Identify and organise biological knowledge. Gene panel databases, variant discovery, and genetic epidemiology.

PanelAppRex AI

The leading disease-gene panel app database with sophisticated search, designed to simplify the discovery of disease.

Archipelago

Manhattan plots are for GWAS. Archipelago plots are for complex variant association studies.

MAFₘₐₓ calculator

Estimate the maximum minor allele frequency (MAF) your cohort can support. A quick, transparent tool for setting MAF thresholds in human WGS cohort analysis.

IEI genetics database

Streamline genetic diagnosis of IEI to quantify both known and uncertain evidence into a single, evidence-based conclusion

New technology releases and blog posts.



Technically sound. Incredibly simple.
